description: Hierarchical role system with goal cascading, authority-based gate routing, and visual org chart. Leverages existing CockpitSession + AgentSlot + ExecutionGate infrastructure. Roles stored in GRDB, managed via OrgChartService actor.
goals: Hierarchical role system integrated with existing cockpit lifecycle
Roles tied to AgentSlots — each slot gets a role assignment
Chairman deliberation upgraded to use org chart for goal distribution
Authority-based gate routing through role hierarchy
non_goals: No generic business roles — code-focused roles only

user_stories.title: OrgRole GRDB model + repository
user_stories.description: New GRDB Record type OrgRole with migration. Fields: id (UUID), sessionId (FK CockpitSession), name (String), roleType (RoleType enum: ceo, tech_lead, backend_engineer, frontend_engineer, qa_engineer, reviewer, devops, architect, custom), parentRoleId (UUID? self-referencing FK), assignedSlotId (UUID? FK AgentSlot), goalDescription (String?), skillNames (String? JSON array), authority (AuthorityLevel enum: full, limited, readonly), timestamps. GRDB association: belongsTo(CockpitSession), optionalBelongsTo(AgentSlot), hasMany(OrgRole as children). Repository actor: OrgRoleRepository with createRole, fetchRolesForSession, fetchChildren(parentId), findCEO(sessionId), updateRole, deleteRole. Max 1 CEO per session constraint.

user_stories.title: Role template system + OrgChartService actor
user_stories.description: New actor OrgChartService. Pre-built templates as static arrays: SoloDev (1 role), Duo (lead + engineer), Squad (lead + 2 engineers + QA), FullTeam (CEO + CTO + 2 leads + 3 engineers + reviewer). applyTemplate(sessionId, templateName) → [OrgRole]: creates roles from template, persists to GRDB. Template auto-populates on cockpit activation — ConductorService calls OrgChartService.applyTemplate before slot assignment. OrgRoleNode tree struct for hierarchical display. getTree(sessionId) → [OrgRoleNode].
tests: Squad template creates 4 roles with correct hierarchy

user_stories.title: Goal cascading via ConductorService
user_stories.description: Upgrade ConductorService.conductSlotAssignment to cascade goals through org hierarchy. Flow: 1) CEO role gets session-level goal (from chairmanBrief). 2) Lead roles decompose into sub-goals mapped to PRD story groups. 3) Engineer roles receive atomic goals mapped to individual stories. cascadeGoals(sessionId, ceoGoal) → updates all OrgRole.goalDescription down the tree. Goals propagate to AgentSlot.currentTask via role-slot binding. Chairman deliberation output now includes role assignments alongside slot assignments.
tests: slot currentTask updated from role goal

user_stories.title: Authority-based gate routing
user_stories.description: Upgrade ExecutionGateStateMachine and CockpitViewModel.approveGate to route approvals through org hierarchy. New method: routeGateApproval(sessionId, slotId, riskLevel) → UUID (role that should approve). Low/medium risk: auto-approved if role has 'full' authority. High risk: escalate to parent role. Critical: escalate to CEO. If no parent, fall back to human approval (existing behavior). Modify CockpitSlotCardView approval card to show 'Awaiting approval from: {role.name}'. Add auto-approve path in gate polling for roles with sufficient authority.
tests: low risk auto-approved by full-authority role

user_stories.title: Org chart SwiftUI view
user_stories.description: New OrgChartView in CockpitModeView. Visual tree layout: TreeLayout using GeometryReader. Each node: RoleNodeView showing role name, agent type icon, status badge (from assigned slot), current task, cost badge. Connection lines: Path between parent-child nodes, color-coded by agent type. Node tap → expand slot details sheet. Drag-and-drop to reassign slots (update OrgRole.assignedSlotId). Real-time updates via CockpitViewModel polling. Template selector dropdown in activation dialog. Collapse/expand subtrees with disclosure group.

user_stories.title: Inter-role communication channels
user_stories.description: Extend MessageBusService with role-aware routing. New AgentMessageType values: delegation, report, peer_request, escalation. Channel types: report_up (child → parent), delegate_down (parent → child), peer (sibling → sibling), broadcast (CEO → all). Role-aware filtering in SlotChatViewModel — show messages relevant to role's position in hierarchy. Automatic status reports: each role's slot sends progress to parent role every N iterations via a new AutoReportService actor that polls slot progress and publishes report messages.
tests: auto status report fires on iteration
